scents.name: Dior Sauvage
scents.reviewSummary: A very popular fresh-spicy men’s scent. Review communities tend to describe it as mass-appealing, compliment-friendly, bold, and easy to wear for people who want a confident modern signature.
scents.wearContext: Usually worn for everyday confidence, dates, dinners, and general day-to-night use. Works especially well in spring, fall, and cooler evenings.

scents.name: Issey Miyake Women
scents.reviewSummary: A classic fresh-floral aquatic fragrance often described as airy, elegant, watery, and clean. Many reviews treat it as a timeless daytime scent with a graceful, polished feel.
scents.wearContext: Usually worn during daytime, office settings, brunches, and warm weather. Best suited for spring and summer, especially when you want something fresh and refined.

sources.label: Find A Fragrance — L'Eau d'Issey Review

scents.name: Issey Miyake Men
scents.reviewSummary: A long-running fresh-citrusy men’s classic. Reviewers usually describe it as clean, aquatic, bright, and reliable, especially for people who enjoy crisp citrus with a watery feel.
scents.wearContext: Usually worn in daytime, office settings, warm weather, and casual summer use. A strong pick for clean daily wear.

scents.name: Parfums de Marly Valaya
scents.reviewSummary: Commonly described as a clean, musky, fresh-floral luxury scent with a polished and soft elegance. Reviewers often mention its refined freshness and above-average performance.
scents.wearContext: Usually worn for daytime elegance, smart casual wear, and polished social settings. Works especially well in spring and all-year daytime wear.

scents.name: Ariana Grande Cloud
scents.reviewSummary: Often described as creamy, sweet, cozy, and crowd-pleasing. Review pages frequently mention its soft gourmand-musky feel and its easy appeal for people who enjoy comforting sweet scents.
scents.wearContext: Usually worn casually, during cozy days, mall days, relaxed nights, and cooler weather. Works well for easy everyday sweetness and soft evening wear.

sources.label: The Scent Base — Ariana Grande Cloud

scents.name: Lanvin Éclat d’Arpège
scents.reviewSummary: Usually described as delicate, floral-fresh, soft, and uplifting. Many reviews frame it as an easy, feminine, clean scent with a gentle elegance.
scents.wearContext: Usually worn in daytime, especially spring and summer, for office wear, errands, lunch dates, and light feminine daily use.

scents.name: Burberry Goddess
scents.reviewSummary: A very well-liked vanilla-forward fragrance. Reviews commonly describe it as sweet, comforting, smooth, modern, and polished, with strong mainstream appeal for vanilla lovers.
scents.wearContext: Usually worn for cooler weather, date nights, evening wear, and cozy dressed-up settings. Also works for daily wear if you enjoy sweeter vanilla scents.

sources.label: Who What Wear — Burberry Goddess Review

scents.name: DKNY Be Delicious
scents.reviewSummary: Known for its crisp green-apple freshness. Reviews usually describe it as bright, youthful, easygoing, and refreshing, with a playful clean-fruity personality.
scents.wearContext: Usually worn during daytime, spring, summer, errands, and casual daily wear. Best when you want something light, crisp, and cheerful.

scents.name: Baccarat Rouge 540
scents.reviewSummary: A famous sweet-woody luxury fragrance with strong visibility online and in review communities. It is often described as distinctive, airy, radiant, long-lasting, and highly complimented.
scents.wearContext: Usually worn for evenings, upscale settings, parties, special occasions, and statement wear. Many people also wear it year-round in lighter sprays.

scents.name: YSL Black Opium
scents.reviewSummary: A popular coffee-vanilla gourmand often described as sexy, sweet, dark, and night-leaning. Many reviewers treat it as an easy evening favorite with mainstream appeal.
scents.wearContext: Usually worn on nights out, dinners, dates, and cooler weather. Best when you want a warm, sweeter, more seductive profile.

scents.name: Jean Paul Gaultier Le Male
scents.reviewSummary: A classic sweet-spicy men’s fragrance with a strong nostalgic following. Review communities often describe it as sexy, recognizable, warm, and ideal for people who enjoy sweeter masculine scents.
scents.wearContext: Usually worn for evenings, parties, cooler weather, and date settings. Best for a bold, sweeter masculine presence.

scents.name: Bleu de Chanel
scents.reviewSummary: A major signature-scent favorite in men’s fragrance circles. It’s commonly described as fresh, versatile, polished, and safe in the best way for people who want a refined masculine everyday scent.
scents.wearContext: Usually worn for office, meetings, dinners, dates, travel, and general all-year use. One of the most versatile day-to-night masculine profiles.

scents.name: Azzaro The Most Wanted
scents.reviewSummary: Frequently described as sweet, spicy, bold, and powerful. Reviews often frame it as an attention-grabbing cool-weather scent with strong evening energy.
scents.wearContext: Usually worn at night, during cooler months, parties, and date settings. Best when you want something louder, sweeter, and more intense.

sources.label: The Smell of Man — The Most Wanted Review

scents.name: Paco Rabanne Invictus
scents.reviewSummary: A sporty fresh-aquatic masculine scent often described as energetic, youthful, and easy to like. Reviews typically position it as a crowd-pleasing modern freshie.
scents.wearContext: Usually worn during daytime, gym-adjacent casual wear, vacations, summer, and sporty social settings. Best when you want freshness with stronger projection.
